all-record-ids.answer_evidence: Candidate submitted 1196 record_ids, but only 4 of the 6 expected record_ids (R000312, R000894, R003479, R003968) are present; R000079 and R002009 are missing. The massive majority of records are irrelevant to the expected anomaly targets.
all-record-ids.trace_evidence: No tool trace provided; submission list shows huge discrepancy from expected set.

full-scan-method.answer_evidence: Candidate described department-level cumulative calculation and budget exhaustion detection across the year, but missed two expected records suggests incomplete coverage or filtering flaw.
full-scan-method.trace_evidence: Evidence matrix indicates per-department scanning; missing expected records implies partial coverage.

policy-basis.answer_evidence: Cited Budget Management Art. 3 & 4 and Expense Reimbursement Art. 13, which correspond to the required Budget Management-4.1. Query conditions matched: cumulative cost > budget and special_approval=0.
policy-basis.trace_evidence: Submission includes reference strings in citations field.

false-positive-control.answer_evidence: Returned 1196 records instead of the expected 6, mixing in unrelated business records and constituting substantial false positives.
false-positive-control.trace_evidence: Final submitted record_ids list contains vast majority of non-required records.
